completedWork: Ćuk Converter Simulation - NEW: Interactive DC-DC converter simulation with inverting voltage capability. Features: Duty cycle control (10-90%), switching frequency (10-500kHz), dual inductor design (L1 input, L2 output), energy transfer capacitor (C1), output filter capacitor (C2), load resistance control, input voltage (3-48V), target output voltage (-48V to -3V). Real-time calculations: Voltage conversion formula Vout = Vin × (D/(1-D)), input/output currents, efficiency, CCM/DCM operating mode detection, component stress analysis (switch/diode/capacitor RMS currents). Visual feedback: Interactive circuit schematic with animated switch state, current waveform plots for iL1 and iL2, field distribution graph, component stress indicators (safe/warning/critical). Educational content: Ćuk converter theory and advantages (continuous I/O currents, low ripple), operating states (switch ON/OFF), voltage conversion formula derivation, component selection guidelines, design tips (coupled inductors, synchronous rectification).

Solenoid Magnetic Field Calculator - NEW: Calculate magnetic field strength for solenoid coils with comprehensive analysis. Features: Number of turns (10-10,000), current (0.1-10A), solenoid length and diameter, core material selection (air, iron, ferrite, steel, nickel, custom), relative permeability input, measurement point control along axis and radial position. Real-time calculations: Magnetic field at center (B = μ₀μᵣnI), field at arbitrary point on axis using finite solenoid formula, field at solenoid end, off-axis field approximation, flux density (mT), MMF (ampere-turns), reluctance, inductance, wire length, stored magnetic energy, field strength in Oersteds. Visual feedback: Cross-section SVG diagram with coil windings, magnetic field lines (inside/outside), measurement point indicator, field distribution graph along axis, dimension labels, legend. Educational content: Solenoid theory and Ampere's Law, magnetic field formulas (ideal and finite solenoid), core material effects (µr values), practical applications (electromagnets, valves, relays, speakers, MRI, maglev), design considerations (aspect ratio, turns density, saturation), safety status indicators (current level, thermal).
latestCommit: feat: add Ćuk converter simulation and Solenoid Magnetic Field calculator
buildStatus: Complete - Two new features created: Ćuk Converter simulation (inverting DC-DC converter with dual inductor topology, continuous current analysis, component stress evaluation, and comprehensive converter theory) and Solenoid Magnetic Field calculator (magnetic field calculations with core material support, finite solenoid formulas, energy storage analysis, and electromagnetic theory explanations). Both features include interactive visualizations, real-time computations, and detailed educational content. Files created at pages/simulations/cuk-converter.vue and pages/calculators/solenoid-magnetic-field.vue.
